props.items:
[
  {
    "id": "sessions_grid",
    "type": "grid",
    "props": {
      "columns": "1",
      "rows": "109",
      "gap": "md",
      "items": "[
  {
    "id": "sessions_header",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session Summaries",
      "color": "primary",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "1",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-28-caelora-has-issues_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 28 - Caelora has Issues!",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "2",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-28-caelora-has-issues_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party continued to help Affy follow a lead in Basctdelm and help Ridley with business in Caelora. At the Whisperpine campsite they encountered the moontouched half-orc adventurer Kulv Farbreak, who hinted at powers echoing Fungus's own, while back at the fire a spirit of an elder druid from Iparos possessed Relys with a command to avenge her village. Upon reaching the terraced city, Urovil Rulendor greeted Ridley with news of an Airithel misfortune. Cerul sensed something foul trailing from the towards House Rulendor and Kaizo's earnest herb inquiries at Dawnpetal went sideways. Nanise Rulendor intercepted Ridley and abruptly relieved him of his duties.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "3",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-28-caelora-has-issues_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 28 - Caelora has Issues! Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ACgEGOFaPiYSlOg_zTmVn2M1dPaxIsRQ/view?usp=sharing",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "4",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-27-don-t-threaten-us_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 27 - Don't Threaten Us",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "6",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-27-don-t-threaten-us_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The caravan was confronted by an elvish wizard and a burly warrior demanding the prisoners' release. The fight ended with the attackers dead, but Ridley's long-sought robed elf escaped during the chaos.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "7",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-27-don-t-threaten-us_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 27 - Don't Threaten Us Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1YCNrVP02iiaABwgud83Q6w7Xq75btu2P/view?usp=sharing",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "8",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-26-to-caelora-and-beyond_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 26 - To Caelora and Beyond",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "10",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-26-to-caelora-and-beyond_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party escorted wagons toward Shademoor, uncovered one of Ridley's targets among the prisoners, gained a bulas named Trygg, and defeated an oni and trolls at a stone bridge.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "11",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-26-to-caelora-and-beyond_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 26 - To Caelora and Beyond Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1LHNkTKPhe8po714ZcVezICFvugx76Spu/view?usp=sharing",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "12",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-25-to-qal-dynn_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 25 - To Qal'dynn",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "14",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-25-to-qal-dynn_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "Everyone exited the Blackstone Crucible with the abacus after testing the gate. On the way to the Abbey, they met spectral giant Amag who warned Cerul of an unresolved scar beneath his birthplace in destroyed Pekanon. Kaizo continued to have difficulty meditating, hinting that Malgri'n was still an issue. They took the Arcane Waypoint to Qal'dynn and met with Lorain Ormseer. Gaining clues about Affy's father and the Promisory in Basctdelm, they agreed to pick up a job as guards for a few wagons that headed that way. Ridley did have some unfinished matters with a clue he uncovered on his hunt for Heildove.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "15",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-25-to-qal-dynn_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 25 - To Qal'dynn Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1RBImyCW5e4UEP9a54bmHlhZYbOj85Wtr/view?usp=sharing",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "16",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-24-into-the-shadowfell_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 24 - Into the Shadowfell",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "18",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-24-into-the-shadowfell_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party set out to investigate and seal the dangerous rift between the material plane and the Shadowfell near Varenwood, and learn what they could of the ruined gnome village of Iparos. After receiving vital information from Zaedra Windfury of the Everdawn, they recovered faint magical remnants from the ruined settlement before stepping through the rift. In the Shadowfell, waves of shadowy assailants and an avatar of Malgri'n assailed them, nearly claiming Fungus before the group rallied before defeated the avatar. Tananan appeared and carried the Feywoven Glyphic away. The party returned to the material plane and dispelled the rift's anchoring magic.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "19",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-24-into-the-shadowfell_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 24 - Into the Shadowfell Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ZPfDzTJlyQe0IpkiRWL3NxQjtaTl8hYi/view?usp=sharing",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "20",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-23-their-fates-tied_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 23 - Their Fates Tied",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "22",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-23-their-fates-tied_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party sought to understand the true purpose of the Blackstone Crucible and determine whether the powerful being bound within it should remain imprisoned. After encountering a Shadar-kai visitor investigating yugoloth activity and learning that Kael Vorduun had been bound as an example by Malgri'n, the party made a fateful oath to release him in exchange for binding another deemed worthy in the future. The session ended with the group stepping through the portal into Varenwood, realizing that Kaizo's disrupted balance, Fungus's patron's imprisonment, and Relys's ruined village were all tied together by the same force.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "23",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-23-their-fates-tied_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 23 - Their Fates Tied Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1GOTJVRHfXYHOjvlQTI5Rm7oDMA3tZXOG/view?usp=drive_link",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "24",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-22-the-blackstone-crucible_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 22 - The Blackstone Crucible",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "26",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-22-the-blackstone-crucible_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party entered a newly revealed black stone structure with the goal of understanding its purpose. Inside, they discovered it's name, the Blackstone Crucible, a vast and ancient construct devoted to the binding and containment of dangerous forces, guided by a rigid doctrine that framed imprisonment as mercy. Their exploration uncovered ritual chambers, indoctrination texts, and an encounter with extra-planar fiends. In the aftermath, the party discovered a mysterious gate calibrated to distant locations and encountered a strange counting entity that reported their presence to a figure named Varmuun.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "27",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-22-the-blackstone-crucible_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 22 - The Blackstone Crucible Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ZQXI5fp1n-gYSvFJygBowjTv7JyeN9Ls/view?usp=sharing",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "28",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-21-the-emerging-temple_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 21 - The Emerging Temple",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "30",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-21-the-emerging-temple_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party set out to investigate the deadly cave route near the Abbey, hoping to learn why no one returned and whether it connected to the wider threats they had been uncovering. Inside, they found signs of curse driven deaths and recovered evidence tying the site back to Dunduar and the strange forces already in motion. Their caution paid off when they defeated a corrupted stone giant guarding the path beyond the ravine. The session ended with a major revelation as the party emerged to find a massive black stone temple newly risen from the earth, its sealed doors marked with an ancient oath to a long forgotten power.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "31",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-21-the-emerging-temple_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 21 - The Emerging Temple Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ZVIBOeA2zLV4WdUH5wIXmspRUeKZ6_H9/view?usp=drive_link",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "32",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-20-restoring-the-abbey_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 20 - Restoring the Abbey",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "34",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-20-restoring-the-abbey_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party worked to secure the Abbey now that its arcane waypoint was restored. They confronted a powerful infiltrator, the Parson, who revealed himself by turning allies to stone, but through coordinated effort and timely magic, the party defeated him and reversed the petrification. In the aftermath, they uncovered hidden vaults and sealed Underdark access beneath the Abbey, choosing restraint over greed to protect what had been entrusted to the order. The session closed with the Abbey finally safe, its people openly grateful, and the party recognized for having turned a looming collapse into a moment of renewed hope.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "35",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-20-restoring-the-abbey_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 20 - Restoring the Abbey Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1vqOnQxEhx80lDJS52nQQirVFI2H1TBnP/view?usp=drive_link",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "36",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-19-ham-s-helping-hand_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 19 - Ham's Helping Hand",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "38",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-19-ham-s-helping-hand_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party pressed deeper beneath the Abbey with the goal of dismantling the Rel'Udomina cell. They exposed another operative group, confirmed that the conspiracy relied on ordinary members of the Abbey above ground, and learned the Rel'Udomina were structured into multiple Looms overseen by Archons. Pushing onward, they fought through possessed defenders and wraithlike entities guarding the waypoint chamber, breaking the possession and reactivating the portal. The session ended the moment the restored waypoint drew hostile attention, leaving the party face to face with a furious new threat just as help could finally reach the Abbey.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "39",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-19-ham-s-helping-hand_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 19 - Ham's Helping Hand Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1neldkkkhq1UNx64WjtVdErqGYIazvwdw/view?usp=drive_link",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "40",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-18-abbey-undercroft_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 18 - Abbey Undercroft",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "42",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-18-abbey-undercroft_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party worked to uncover how deeply the Rel'Udomina had infiltrated the Abbey and to locate the source of the threats spreading beneath its halls. Their investigation confirmed the existence of hidden passages and planted arcane devices meant to isolate the Abbey from outside aid, forcing them to descend into the undercroft. There, they exposed an active Rel'Udomina cell operating inside the Abbey itself and fought to prevent its members from escaping deeper underground. The session ended with prisoners freed, documents recovered, and the grim realization that trusted figures within the Abbey had been compromised as part of a wider coordinated conspiracy.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "43",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-18-abbey-undercroft_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 18 - Abbey Undercroft Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1YyTmsijfqKHgzRsN2HqsGQKI0z6Nswpb/view?usp=drive_link",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "44",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-17-abbey-arrival_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 17 - Abbey Arrival",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "46",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-17-abbey-arrival_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The group aimed to reach the Abbey, survive the ambush that had petrified a stone giant ally, and find a way inside to learn what threat had taken hold. They fought off a coordinated attack of stone and winged predators, then attempted to restore their ally with powerful magic, only to see it fail. With no cure in hand, Cerul used his history and voice among the stone giants to negotiate passage, earning a guarded escort into the Abbey grounds. Once inside, the party learned the unsettling truth, something was moving beneath the Abbey, and fear, silence, and hostage threats had kept everyone trapped in place.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "47",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-17-abbey-arrival_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 17 - Abbey Arrival Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1c0WISriAyr_9u7NzLr1H72AZbY_v0pkd/view?usp=drive_link",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "48",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-16-to-the-abbey_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 16 - To the Abbey",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "50",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-16-to-the-abbey_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party set out from Qal'dynn with the urgent goal of reaching the Abbey, uncovering what had gone wrong there, and finding a way to save a stone giant ally who had been turned to stone. Along the way, they gathered limited but critical resources, learned that the threat surrounding the Abbey was as spiritual as it was physical, and received troubling warnings tied to fate and borrowed power. As they neared their destination, signs of devastation mounted, shattered caravans, giant carved warnings, and a looming presence in the distance. The session ended the moment the party found the petrified giant and was immediately ambushed.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "51",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-16-to-the-abbey_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 16 - To the Abbey Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Z6AooNIFf_wWR8pXJCyk-jVEJ5W_1YbE/view?usp=drive_link",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "52",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-15-empower-the-charm_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 15 - Empower the Charm",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "54",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-15-empower-the-charm_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party sought to empowering Fungus's fey charm and securing long term stability for their growing influence in Qal'dynn. Through alchemical work and a moonlit ritual at the Ring of Sylunara, they successfully awakened the Charm of the Slumbering Grove, only to draw immediate attention from hostile fey forces seeking to reclaim it. A sudden, intense clash ended with the attackers defeated, valuable spoils recovered, and the realization that powerful fey lords were now aware of the party and their actions. In the aftermath, the party finalized legal control of their land, set plans in motion for a retreat centered on balance and harmony, and regrouped as Cerul returned, marking a moment of consolidation before the next looming test.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "55",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-15-empower-the-charm_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 15 - Empower the Charm Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/178-4GQ_mydGQLtILoXUwtmB8hwHSLLBP/view?usp=drive_link",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "56",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-14-thinbrew-hideaway_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 14 - Thinbrew Hideaway",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "58",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-14-thinbrew-hideaway_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party set out to secure rare Lusterbee wax for Iofyr's alchemical work while confirming whether the Rel'Udomina were still operating in the region. Their search led them to a hidden ravine operation where a stolen queen bee was being exploited by a black market group guarded by goblins and a dangerous mage. Through careful timing and decisive combat, the party dismantled the operation, recovered the queen and hive, and prevented the alarm from spreading. They returned the queen safely and earned the wax they needed, closing the session with a critical resource secured and warnings of greater danger still looming at the Abbey.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "59",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {

  {
    "id": "session-13-qal-dynn-mysteries_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 13 - Qal'dynn Mysteries",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "62",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-13-qal-dynn-mysteries_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party focused on following new leads within Qal'dynn. Their investigation uncovered a murdered messenger carrying a warning meant for Affy, pointing toward Basctdelm and her father, and revealed that someone was deliberately targeting those connected to her past. At the same time, they confronted unresolved threats beneath Moonroot Hollow, destroying arcane parasites and stabilizing a damaged leypost before the situation could worsen. The session closed with a sobering realization that the Rel'Udomina were still active in the city, even after everything the party had exposed.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "63",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-13-qal-dynn-mysteries_recording_1",

  },
  {
    "id": "session-12-ambassador-hamalex_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 12 - Ambassador Hamalex",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "66",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-12-ambassador-hamalex_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party sought to solidify their standing in Qal'dynn by turning their discoveries into lasting action and helping stabilize the dangers threatening the city. They earned the king's trust, pursued solutions to lingering magical threats, and chose diplomacy over force when unrest flared in Moonroot Hollow, preventing further damage to the ley thread beneath the city. Their efforts culminated in a measured, peaceful resolution that protected both the city and those caught in the conflict. By the end of the session, Ham was formally named Ambassador of Qal'dynn, marking a turning point where the party's influence shifted from covert intervention to recognized authority.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "67",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },

    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-11-audience-with-the-king_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 11 - Audience with the King",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "70",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-11-audience-with-the-king_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party worked to escape the Rel'Udomina tunnels beneath Qal'dynn, secure official authority, and finally deliver their evidence and sealed message to the crown. After fighting through infiltrators and exposing assassins posing as realmwardens within the university, they seized proof that the conspiracy had reached deep into the city itself. They regrouped long enough to manage the cube's dangerous side effects and coordinate a lawful approach to power rather than continuing as fugitives. The session culminated in a formal escort into the citadel, where the party was granted an audience with King Highvale.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "71",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },

    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-10-prominent-rel-udomina_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 10 - Prominent Rel'Udomina",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "74",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-10-prominent-rel-udomina_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party pressed deeper into the Rel'Udomina hideout beneath Qal'dynn with the goal of confronting its leadership, dismantling the operation, and securing a path to warn the king. They defeated the organization's prominent leader after a hard fought clash, uncovering evidence of covert communication, fey involvement, and a network designed to spy on and destabilize the city. The session ended in rising tension as an attempted escape, the sound of fighting above, and the sudden arrival of a Realmwarden made it clear that their secret war beneath Qal'dynn was about to become very public.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "75",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-10-prominent-rel-udomina_recording_1",

    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-9-rel-udomina-hideout_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 9 - Rel'Udomina Hideout",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "78",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-9-rel-udomina-hideout_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The group entered the hidden tunnels beneath Qal'dynn with the goal of exposing the Rel'Udomina's operations and protecting the sealed message they carried. As they explored the hideout, they uncovered incriminating maps and documents pointing to a figure known as The Prominent, confirmed the tunnels were being used to spy directly on the king, and seized a powerful scrying device as proof. When deception failed, the party eliminated a cell of Rel'Udomina agents and identified their mark, then forced a hired guard to stand down and reveal how the organization moved through the city unseen. The session ended on a sharp cliffhanger as the party opened a final chamber and came face to face with a woman who knew Affy by name, flanked by hounds and something far more dangerous.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "79",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },

    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-8-the-secret-path-into-qal-dynn_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 8 - The Secret Path Into Qal'dynn",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "82",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-8-the-secret-path-into-qal-dynn_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party pressed toward Qal'dynn with the urgent goal of delivering the sealed scroll and uncovering the truth behind the Rel'Udomina, only to find the city gates firmly closed. After failing to gain entry, they followed a hidden route marked on their map, using a spoken key to reveal a secret passage into the earth beneath the city. Within the tunnels, they overcame a powerful construct guarding an ancient door tied to the Aetherion Academy. The party unlocked the passage and stood on the threshold of Qal'dynn at last, carrying both proof of conspiracy and the weight of what awaited inside.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "83",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },

    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-7-elle-berian-shrine_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 7 - Elle'berian Shrine",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "86",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-7-elle-berian-shrine_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "Our adventurers returned to O'naren to secure official support and follow leads tied to the Rel'Udomina. In town, they recovered a pendant linked to Affy's past, planted the seeds of a quiet sanctuary through Kaizo's efforts, and accepted a formal mission to find a missing courier after learning Qal'dynn had sealed its gates. On the road, the cube's influence deepened, granting Fungus a lasting boon while afflicting Affy with a disturbing transformation. The session culminated at a defiled Elle'berian shrine, where the party exposed and defeated disguised Rel'Udomina agents, uncovering orders to assassinate a diplomat and the grim fate of the courier they were sent to find.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "87",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },

      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-6-cackletongue-lair_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 6 - Cackletongue Lair",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "90",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-6-cackletongue-lair_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "Our adventurers pushed into the gnoll lair to eliminate the source of the raids and uncover what had corrupted the Silent Circle. Inside the caves, they battled spore filled fungal growths, survived a deadly ambush by an ooze, and fought through a smoke choked chamber to bring down the gnoll pack leader and his infernal ally. Along the way they uncovered valuable loot and disturbing signs that something far darker than gnolls had taken root in the region. The session ended with a shocking revelation as Cerul manifested radiant wings, confirming the meaning behind the taunts of 'angel blood' and reshaping how the party understood one of their own.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "91",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },

    "id": "session-6-cackletongue-lair_recording_1",

    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-5-silent-circle-gnolls_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 5 - Silent Circle Gnolls",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "94",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-5-silent-circle-gnolls_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The group worked to secure allies in O'naren, uncover the truth behind the growing threat tied to the Rel'Udomina, and end the gnoll raids defiling the Silent Circle before the corruption spread further. They sought insight from the Oracle, who confirmed that answers about the strange essence powder and Fungus's mysterious artifact lay with Iofyr in Qal'dynn. That night, the party confronted the gnolls at the Silent Circle and discovered the satyr druid Kasani had been overtaken by a malignant influence. After a brutal fight that destroyed the gnolls and the wailing fungal growth empowering them, the party salvaged what remained of the sacred site and followed the attackers' trail to a nearby cave. There, blue smoke and a chilling voice waiting within made it clear that the danger was far from over.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "95",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-5-silent-circle-gnolls_recording_1",

      "row": "96",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-4-in-o-naren_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 4 - In O'naren",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "98",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-4-in-o-naren_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "Our adventurers arrived in O'naren intent on uncovering who was behind the killings on the road, finding answers about the strange powder afflicting Ro's father, and warning local authorities about the growing threats tied to the Broken Citadel. As they investigated the town, they exposed a middleman named Kool'ok and traced the violence back to Vrathin, the local mapmaker, while also learning the powder may be an essence substance capable of anchoring souls between worlds. Their search led them to new dangers and obligations, including nightly gnoll raids on a sacred druidic site and deeper ties to the Cloak of Defiance than first assumed. By the end of the session, discussions with Captain Salal revealed the situation was far more dire, pointing not to common criminal intrigue, but to the shadow of Rel'Udomina itself.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "99",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-4-in-o-naren_recording_1",

    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-3-road-to-o-naren_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 3 - Road to O'naren",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "102",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-3-road-to-o-naren_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party set out from Mossholde toward O'naren, aiming to have the strange powder examined and to warn others about the dangers uncovered beneath the Broken Citadel. Along the road, they experimented further with the rune covered cube, triggering unpredictable effects creating suspicions of the artifact's far reaching consequences. Their journey was marked by violence, including an ambush by strange creatures and a desperate chase against hired killers preying on fleeing civilians. Although the party defeated the attackers and gathered evidence of a larger plot, they arrived in O'naren carrying the heavy cost of lives they could not save.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "103",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-3-road-to-o-naren_recording_1",

    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-2-beneath-the-citadel_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 2 - Beneath the Citadel",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "106",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-2-beneath-the-citadel_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party focused on uncovering what lay beneath the Broken Citadel. After splitting briefly to ensure the rescued wolf pup and the strange powder were returned safely to Mossholde, the remaining adventurers descended into the ruins below and found evidence of layered, ancient uses, including alchemical work, undead guardians, and infernal summoning. Through several tense fights and careful exploration, they uncovered a long forgotten teleportation circle, a sealed Feywild portal, and a rune covered cube pulsing with unstable magic. By the end of the delve, the group realized the citadel was a crossroads of powerful forces, and that answers for Ro's father and warnings for Cerul's allies both pointed them toward Qal'dynn as their next destination.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "107",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-1-met-in-mossholde_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 1 - Met in Mossholde",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "108",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-1-met-in-mossholde_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "In the first session, the party came together at the remote outpost of Mossholde, each carrying their own reasons for being on the frontier. A badly wounded elf staggered in during the night, he warned them of an ambush by strange blue creatures and pointed toward the ruins of an old citadel in the southern valley. Choosing action over caution, the group tracked the attackers at first light, uncovering signs of grisly feeding and unnatural behavior. Their pursuit led them into the Broken Citadel itself, where a hard fought battle revealed organized enemies, unsettling magical clues, and the first clear link between the ruins and the poison that had sickened Ro's father.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "109",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  }
]"
    }
  }
]
